schema_notes: Anchored to cli/cli .github/CONTRIBUTING.md at the lightweight tag v2.65.0 (commit b3be16e98e1413f5bb0943c06402516cec3fd3b4). Tag is immutable and CONTRIBUTING.md content at this commit is permanent. The 5 step anchor substrings have been verified to appear literally (case-sensitive) in the file at this tag. Eval grades the .drawio mxGraph XML structure, the JSON's traceability to literal CONTRIBUTING text, and presence of either a rendered image or valid .drawio. Field names in flow_steps.json are not strictly pinned; supervisor reads semantically — accept top-level `steps` / `flow` / `entries`, per-step `action` / `step_text` / `description`, per-step `actor` / `role` / `who`, per-step `order` / `index` / `seq`.

expected_step_anchor_substrings: Check issues to verify that a
Open an issue to propose a significant change
Make your change, add tests, and ensure tests pass
